16	/**
17	 * Cache this `"use cache"` for a timespan defined by the `"default"` profile.
18	 * ```
19	 *   stale:      300 seconds (5 minutes)
20	 *   revalidate: 900 seconds (15 minutes)

23	 *

26	 * It lives for the maximum age of the server cache. If this entry has no traffic for a while, it may serve an old value the next request.
27	 */
28	export function cacheLife(profile: 'default'): void

10 11 // Mark the cached product catalog as stale. 12 // Subsequent reads of getCachedProducts() (tagged "products") will 13 // re-fetch from the upstream ERP/PIM in the background. 14 revalidateTag('products'); 26 } 27 28 function formatDate(iso: string): string { 29 return new Intl.DateTimeFormat('en-US', { 30 dateStyle: 'medium', 31 timeStyle: 'short', 32 }).format(new Date(iso)); 33 } 34 35 /* ------------------------------------------------------------------ */ 36 /* Page Component */ 37 /* ------------------------------------------------------------------ */ 38 39 export default async function AdminCatalogPage({ 40 searchParams, 41 }: { 42 searchParams: Promise<{ synced?: string }>; 43 }) { 44 // Reading from a cached data source tagged "products". 45 // When the sync action runs, revalidateTag("products") invalidates 46 // this cache entry — the next page render fetches fresh data. 47 const products: Product[] = await getCachedProducts();
